The problem

Old school physio wasn't built for athletes.

Weekly check-ins. Generic exercises. "It depends" when you ask how long you'll be out. That model was designed for office workers with sore backs — not footballers, court athletes or combat competitors who can't play the sport they love.

01

No clear timeline or plan

You leave every appointment without knowing if you're on track — or what "on track" even looks like. That uncertainty makes it impossible to plan when you return, how hard to push, or whether you're heading in the right direction at all.

02

Generic exercises with no sport context

A netball wing attack, a rugby prop and a BJJ competitor all have different demands. Your program should reflect your sport, your position, your training week — it rarely does.

03

"Stop training" — with no alternative

Rest has a role. But full rest prescribed without a path forward doesn't work for a competitive athlete. There is almost always something you can keep doing — and should be.

The solution

The Rehab
Accelerator.

A unique sports injury solution for Melbourne's competitive athletes — team sport and combat. Physio, strength & conditioning, and movement coaching — integrated under one roof, from one plan. Every athlete leaves their first appointment with a written week-by-week program and a target return date.

What's included in every program
✓
Weekly 1:1 Physiotherapy
Full session + program review every week — not a 15-min check-in
✓
Sport-Specific S&C Program
Built for your sport, your position, your training demands
✓
Physio Accountability & Direct Communication
Regular check-ins, messaging access and program updates — your physio stays across your week, not just your appointment
✓
Return-to-Sport Clearance Testing
Objective confirmation — not a calendar date or gut feel
✓
Gym & Coach Liaison Access
Access to a gym and program coaching when you need it — so you can exercise and progress between appointments
✓
Motion Code Pro Access
AI-powered platform — exercise prescription, movement overlay & live milestone tracking
Our commitment at every first appointment

You will leave with a written, week-by-week plan and a target return timeframe — based on your injury, your sport, and your objective assessment results. Not a guess.

01
Assess — Full athlete profile, injury history & sport demands
02
Plan — Written program, milestones & target return date
03
Execute — Weekly physio + S&C, updated every session
04
Clear — Return confirmed by objective sport-specific testing

Motion Code Pro
AI-powered injury & performance platform. Real-time exercise prescription, movement overlay, and a live view of your return milestones — updated every session.
From $185 / week  ·  all-inclusive
Combat Athletes

BJJ. MMA. Boxing.
We understand
your sport.

Most physios treat combat athletes like everyone else — rest, generic exercises, wait. They don't understand why you can't stop rolling for 12 weeks. We do.

We map what you can keep doing from day one. Drilling when you can't spar. Upper body when the knee is out. Maintaining cardio while the shoulder heals.

  • ✓Sport-mapped training — what's safe, what's off, and why
  • ✓Grading, comp & fight timelines built into your plan
  • ✓BJJ, wrestling & grappling load mapped to your recovery
  • ✓Return confirmed by objective testing — not a guess
ACL Specialists

Prepared to Play
ACL Program.

ACL rehabilitation is the most complex, highest-stakes injury in sport. Done wrong, re-rupture rates exceed 25%. Done right, athletes return stronger than before — with data to prove it.

Stride is an accredited partner of the Prepared to Play ACL Program — AI-powered injury analysis and movement profiling to build a personalised, evidence-based pathway from surgery to full return-to-play clearance.

  • ✓Phase-by-phase return-to-sport milestones — no guessing
  • ✓Objective movement testing at each clearance gate
  • ✓AI-powered movement profiling via Motion Code Pro
  • ✓Return-to-play confirmation backed by biomechanical data

Our commitment

If it's not right,
we'll make it right.

We're confident in our approach — and we back that up with a genuine commitment to your experience.

If you're not satisfied with your initial consultation, contact us and we'll work to make it right. We take every concern seriously and will discuss what options are appropriate for your situation.

We want every athlete who walks through our door to feel the difference from the first appointment. That's not a marketing line — it's how we've operated since 2017.

Who you'll work with

Elite sport expertise.
In your corner.

Director · Senior Athletic Physiotherapist
Chris Tandy

Masters of Sports Physiotherapy, La Trobe University. 11 years embedded at Melbourne Storm NRL — premierships in 2017 and 2020. Essendon Football Club VFL. Published researcher in warm-up protocols. The methodology that keeps elite athletes on the park now drives every program at Stride.

Senior Athletic Physiotherapist
Tom Yeung

Bachelor of Physiotherapy, La Trobe University, with additional training in Sports & Exercise Rehabilitation. Avid gym-goer with a background in combat training — Tom brings genuine understanding of the demands combat athletes face. He knows why a 12-week full rest prescription doesn't work for a competitor.

Rehab Readiness Self-Check
5 questions to help identify gaps in your rehab — and start the right conversation with a physio.
Question 1 of 5
Do you have a clear, written return-to-sport date from your physio?
Question 2 of 5
Are you maintaining your strength and fitness during rehab?
Question 3 of 5
Has your injury been properly diagnosed?
Question 4 of 5
Have you been tested for return-to-sport readiness?
Question 5 of 5
How confident are you in your current rehab plan?

Your results
